feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Using Association Analysis to Uncover Exoplanet Occurrences
entry.content:
Authors: M Burch, M Wong, A Prabhu - American Astronomical Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: ... Exoplanet attributes inform our understanding of planetary system formation and evolution, and detecting candidate planets with attributes that match what we know about habitable environments is the first step toward finding alien life in the cosmos ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: (habitable|habitability planet|planetary|world ... (keyword alert)

entry.title: Using Association Analysis to Uncover Exoplanet Occurrences
entry.content:
Authors: M Burch, M Wong, A Prabhu - American Astronomical Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: ... Detecting exoplanets is critical for studying planetary systems and aiding the search for life beyond Earth. Exoplanet attributes inform our ... the existence of a sub- saturn planet in the habitable zone in a system with a mini- neptune and a sub- saturn ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.content:

entry.title: 2, 3 (2025). Membrane Evolution and Ion Selectivity: Insights into the Origins of Cellular Life

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: JJD Sangma - Zoological Reports: An International Journal

Abstract: ... This review synthesizes current knowledge on prebiotic membrane formation, lipid evolution, early ion permeability, the origin of transport ... This article explores how membrane evolution and ion selectivity intersect in the origin of life narrative. It ...

entry.title: Efficacy of a probiotic- prebiotic mix on chronic constipation symptoms in the elderly: results of a pilot study

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: P Montarsolo, S Barbagallo, P Fioravanti, P Benatti... - Minerva gastroenterology

Abstract: Background Constipation affects about 25% of the general population, with higher prevalence in elderly people. Many of the products used for the treatment of constipation, laxatives and drugs with this indication have undesirable effects such ...

entry.title: Investigation of Precursors to Prebiotic Species in the prestellar core IRAS 16293 E

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Meyers, S Scibelli - American Astronomical Society Meeting Abstracts, 2026

Abstract: Prestellar cores are regions of the interstellar medium where low-mass (M≤ few M☉) stars and planetary systems form. Complex organic molecules (COMs) residing in prestellar cores are crucial to understanding how prebiotic compounds form and self-organize ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Microbial Endolithic Community at Meteor Crater
entry.content:
Authors: DA Kring, CS Cockell - Meteoritics & Planetary Science, 2026

Abstract: Postimpact recovery and evolution in response to climate changes produced a modern ecosystem at Meteor Crater dominated by a grassland and woodland of piñon and juniper, which has been used to evaluate floral and megafaunal ...

Alert: Charles Cockell (author alert)

entry.title: Biocontrol potential and molecular basis of predation in a marine raptorial ciliate
entry.content:
Authors: J Pan, J Ni, Y Wang, Z Deng, H Yue, K Dong, Y Li, Z Lei... - The ISME Journal, 2026

Abstract: Predator-prey interactions are widespread across organisms and are key drivers of morphological and behavioral evolution. Despite this, predation remains poorly understood among microbial eukaryotes, mostly due to the absence of a tractable ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life
